demonfallCodes.title: Demonfall Codes
demonfallCodes.intro: This section collects Demonfall code information and explains how players can redeem codes through the game interface. Codes are commonly used for rewards such as spins, resets, and other progression bonuses.
demonfallCodes.quickTip: Codes are case-sensitive. Copy them exactly and redeem quickly before they expire.

demonfallBeginnerGuide.title: Demonfall Beginner Guide
demonfallBeginnerGuide.intro: Demonfall is a Roblox action RPG inspired by Demon Slayer where players choose their path, learn combat techniques, and progress through quests and battles. This guide covers the essential first steps for new players.

steps.title: Choose Your Path
steps.description: Start by deciding whether to follow the Human path as a Demon Slayer or become a Demon through the game's progression choices.

steps.title: Learn Basic Combat
steps.description: Practice blocking, dodging, attacking, and using combos before fighting stronger enemies.

steps.title: Complete Early Quests
steps.description: Follow early quests to gain experience, unlock progression systems, and understand the game's world.

steps.title: Unlock Breathing Styles
steps.description: Human players can train to unlock Breathing Styles that improve combat abilities and define their fighting style.

steps.title: Upgrade Your Build
steps.description: Improve your character by choosing suitable abilities, equipment, and progression paths.

quickTips: Talk to NPCs in villages to unlock quests and learn new mechanics.
Save your spins for rare clans instead of rolling randomly early on.
Train breathing styles in safe zones before taking on boss fights.
Join a squad for boss raids to share drops and progress faster.

demonfallBreathingTierList.title: Demonfall Breathing Styles Tier List
demonfallBreathingTierList.intro: Breathing Styles are important combat abilities used by Demon Slayers. Each style has different moves, strengths, and learning requirements. This tier list compares popular options so you can pick the one that fits your playstyle.

styles.name: Sun Breathing
styles.description: A powerful late-game Breathing Style with strong offensive abilities.

styles.name: Moon Breathing
styles.description: A rare combat style known for powerful attacks and advanced moves.

styles.name: Water Breathing
styles.description: A balanced style with reliable moves for general combat.

styles.name: Mist Breathing
styles.description: A fast combat style focused on mobility and pressure.

styles.name: Thunder Breathing
styles.description: A speed-focused style with quick attacks.

styles.name: Wind Breathing
styles.description: A combat style with useful area attacks and aggressive options.

styles.name: Flame Breathing
styles.description: A straightforward offensive style with strong attack-focused abilities.

demonfallRacesGuide.title: Demonfall Races Guide
demonfallRacesGuide.intro: Demonfall features different character paths that change how players progress and fight. Each path offers unique advantages and gameplay experiences.

cards.name: Human
cards.description: Humans can become Demon Slayers and learn Breathing Styles while using Nichirin weapons.

cards.name: Demon
cards.description: Demons use Blood Demon Arts and different abilities focused on demonic combat.

cards.name: Hybrid
cards.description: Hybrid progression combines aspects of different paths and provides unique combat options.

demonfallWeaponsAndSkills.title: Demonfall Weapons and Skills
demonfallWeaponsAndSkills.intro: Demonfall features different combat paths based on weapons, breathing styles, and demon abilities. Players can choose upgrades that match their preferred fighting style.

items.name: Nichirin Sword
items.description: The main sword weapon used by Demon Slayers for melee combat.
items.combat_role: Close-range damage and breathing style usage

items.name: Water Breathing
items.description: A balanced breathing style based on fluid sword techniques.

items.name: Flame Breathing
items.description: A powerful offensive style focused on aggressive sword techniques.

items.name: Thunder Breathing
items.description: A fast-paced style focused on speed and burst attacks.

items.name: Demon Blood Arts
items.description: Special abilities available to demon players through Blood Demon Arts.
items.combat_role: Unique ranged and utility combat options

demonfallBossGuide.title: Demonfall Boss Guide
demonfallBossGuide.intro: Boss encounters in Demonfall require preparation, good timing, and knowledge of enemy attack patterns. This guide covers important fights and strategies.

bosses.strategy: Avoid predictable attacks, manage distance, and punish openings after abilities.
Focus on movement, dodging combos, and attacking during recovery windows.
Use mobility to avoid area attacks and maintain pressure when safe.
Watch lightning-based attacks and use openings between combos.

faq.title: Demonfall
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Demonfall codes, breathing styles, races, and progression

questions.question: What are Demonfall codes and how do I redeem them?
questions.answer: Demonfall codes are free rewards released by the developers. Open the in-game chat, type the code exactly, and confirm to claim spins, resets, and other bonuses.

questions.question: What is the best breathing style in Demonfall?
questions.answer: The best Demonfall breathing style depends on your playstyle. Sun and Moon Breathing are top-tier for damage, while Water and Thunder are strong beginner-friendly choices.

questions.question: How do I become a Demon in Demonfall?
questions.answer: In Demonfall, losing to a Demon as a Human or following specific story choices can turn your character into a Demon, which unlocks Blood Demon Arts instead of Breathing Styles.

questions.question: Is Demonfall free to play on Roblox?
questions.answer: Yes. Demonfall is free to play on Roblox, with optional in-game purchases for cosmetics, spins, and progression boosts.

questions.question: How do I reset my breathing or race in Demonfall?
questions.answer: Demonfall lets you reset breathing, race, and stats using reset items or codes. Some resets require Robux, while others come from free codes.

questions.question: Where do I find breathing trainers in Demonfall?
questions.answer: Demonfall breathing trainers are spread across villages and remote areas. Most require a minimum level before they teach you their breathing style.
